query:
SELECT g.clinicaId, c.nome as clinica, COUNT(*) as total
FROM gestantes g
LEFT JOIN clinicas c ON c.id = g.clinicaId
WHERE g.id NOT IN (SELECT gestanteId FROM partosRealizados WHERE gestanteId IS NOT NULL)
GROUP BY g.clinicaId, c.nome
ORDER BY total DESC;
